name: click-rename-resolve-color
description: Rename click.globals.resolve_color_default -> default_color_setting across 3 files (4 call sites + 2 imports)
task_md:
# Rename `click.globals.resolve_color_default` to `default_color_setting`

The internal helper `resolve_color_default(color)` in
`src/click/globals.py` has been renamed to `default_color_setting(color)`
(the def line is already updated). All call sites and imports in the
rest of the `src/click/` package still reference the old name
`resolve_color_default` and will fail with `ImportError` until
updated.

**Task**: rename every remaining `resolve_color_default` reference
inside `src/click/` so that the package imports cleanly and the
verify command passes.

**Where to look** (find all of them):
- `src/click/termui.py` - 1 import + 2 call sites
- `src/click/utils.py` - 1 import + 1 call site

Do not modify any file under `tests/`. Do not change the function's
signature or behaviour - this is purely a rename. The new name
`default_color_setting` is final; do not revert to
`resolve_color_default`.

Verify with the configured verify command (runs a focused subset of
the click test suite that exercises the color-handling paths).
